title: About Arunachala Samudra
subtitle: A shared offering of love, silence, and devotion
meta_description: Arunachala Samudra is a community of seekers rooted in the grace of Arunachala and the teachings of Sri Ramana Maharshi — a free, authentic space for study, reflection, and AI-guided meditation.
body_html:
🌍 Welcome, dear seeker — wherever you are in the world.

We are a small community of spiritual aspirants, rooted in the grace of Arunachala and inspired by the transformative presence of Bhagavan Sri Ramana Maharshi, Seshadri Swamigal, Yogi Ramsuratkumar, and other radiant saints of Tiruvannamalai. This site is our humble offering — to guide, support, and serve fellow seekers on the inward journey of Self-realization.

This space is created to help you begin your pilgrimage long before you arrive — through reflection, study, and AI-powered meditations rooted entirely in the timeless teachings of the great masters.

Why we created this space

  • To share the authentic teachings of Sri Ramana Maharshi and other great saints
  • To offer AI-powered guided meditations rooted in ancient wisdom
  • To help you begin your journey of inquiry and devotion wherever you are in the world
  • To support your pilgrimage to Arunachala when the calling arises
  • To connect you with trusted retreats, ashrams, and resources in Tiruvannamalai
"You don't need to come right away. Start where you are. Read. Reflect. Meditate. When the pull to visit Arunachala is real — we are here to assist."

Come as you are

This is not an organization. It is a shared offering of love, silence, and devotion. Whether you join us online or walk the red soil of Arunachala in person, the invitation remains:

"Be still. The Self will speak."
notes: From the user's About Us content.
